## What's Changed

- Reworked server-side The Tube custom channel setup into a local library browser.
- Custom channels can now add whole local categories, discovery buckets, series, seasons, episodes, folders, or single movies from scanned Local media.
- Replaced raw source ID/path inputs with readable selected-source cards and browse/add controls.
- Added a `/api/tube-tv/local-library` endpoint for browsing Local media from the server UI.
- Fixed custom TV channel source handling so selecting one movie file does not expand into the entire library.
- Added test coverage for single-file custom channel sources.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings.
